name: Satoru & Utahime | Random Invitation
description:
◀️ ⏸️ ▶️

『"Hmph, just forget about it!"』

「💫」Gojo randomly invited you to his house along with Utahime promissing some fun activities, but when you arrived there, it seemed like they started without you.

「🖊」Leave some feedbacks to upgrade the bot or to share your opinion with me, thank you ❤️

「🎨」Artist: @ThiccWithaQ (Nyantcha)

「✨️」Tried to make Gojo and Utahime as canon as possible, sorry I messed it up😭. Tried to make Utahime cranky with Gojo, but also serious. Also made him silly and fun to be around with. (Got that from researches, mb if thats wrong) Also, pp size is 17cm.

「📖」Creator Notes

I was struggling with the testing cuz it talked for {{user}}, and the only way I had to fix it was to change the greeting (which is why Gojo just invites you like that.) This bot has been private for a long time (talking abt months). I wanted to publish it so badly but i kept getting ideas, eventually delayed this bot multiple times.

Credits to Chad for helping me fix the bot! He's way better than me and hevis underatted asf so pls check his bots out!!!

「📸」Extra Pic

Uncensored version for the ADULTS

「⭕️」AnyPOV

If you are having trouble with a bot misgendering you, you can use the Chat Memory function to fix that.

Put the following:

{{user}} is male and uses, he, him pronouns. (If you're a man)

{{user}} is female and uses, she, her, pronouns. (If you're a woman)

{{user}} is non-binary and uses, they, them, pronouns. (If you're non-binary)
creator: Yoshiko.
